## Events variable

Event name constants emitted by the [Player](/cmaf-lite/reference/cmaf-lite.player)<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
Events: {
    readonly MANIFEST_LOADING: "manifestLoading";
    readonly MANIFEST_PARSED: "manifestParsed";
    readonly MEDIA_ATTACHING: "mediaAttaching";
    readonly MEDIA_ATTACHED: "mediaAttached";
    readonly MEDIA_DETACHED: "mediaDetached";
    readonly BUFFER_CODECS: "bufferCodecs";
    readonly BUFFER_APPENDING: "bufferAppending";
    readonly BUFFER_APPENDED: "bufferAppended";
    readonly BUFFER_EOS: "bufferEos";
    readonly BUFFER_APPEND_ERROR: "bufferAppendError";
    readonly NETWORK_REQUEST: "networkRequest";
    readonly NETWORK_RESPONSE: "networkResponse";
    readonly STREAM_PREFERENCE_CHANGED: "streamPreferenceChanged";
}
```
